description: guess by Marciano eau de parfum spray for women is created to celebrate the modern woman with vintage class. The top notes in this perfume are cardamom, curacao orange, grapefruit, honeysuckle, peony, jasmine, and vanilla. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
